JSyn      ----     Java Audio Synthesis API

Wire

  • Wire is a graphical patch editor built for JSyn.
  • Wire allows you to design synthesis patches interactively by connecting unit generators in a "flow diagram".
  • You can then generate Java source code that will create a JSyn SynthNote. The new sound can then be used in Java Applets.


 [TOP]  [PREVIOUS]  [NEXT]

Visit the JSyn or SoftSynth home pages.
